creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
If it helps … after stopping the service: 

root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/var/cache/netdata # ls -ahlrt
total 5887
prw-rw----  1 netdata  netdata     0B Apr 17  2021 .netdata_bash_sleep_timer_fifo
-rw-------  1 netdata  netdata   795K Sep 10  2022 dead.letter
drwxr-xr-x  6 root     wheel       6B Nov  1 02:17 ..
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata    16K Feb 21 08:53 context-meta.db
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata    25M Feb 22 17:06 anomaly-detection.db
drwxr-x---  4 netdata  netdata    13B Mar 13 01:57 .
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata   1.8M Apr 22 12:37 context-meta.db-wal
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata    32K Apr 22 20:07 context-meta.db-shm
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata   2.7M Apr 23 23:34 netdata-meta.db
drwxrwx---  2 netdata  netdata    73B Apr 24 01:27 dbengine-tier1
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata   9.0M Apr 24 05:29 netdata-meta.db-wal
drwxrwx---  2 netdata  netdata   124B Apr 24 05:30 dbengine
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata    32K Apr 24 05:42 netdata-meta.db-shm
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/var/cache/netdata # ls -ahl
total 5887
drwxr-x---  4 netdata  netdata    13B Mar 13 01:57 .
drwxr-xr-x  6 root     wheel       6B Nov  1 02:17 ..
prw-rw----  1 netdata  netdata     0B Apr 17  2021 .netdata_bash_sleep_timer_fifo
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata    25M Feb 22 17:06 anomaly-detection.db
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata    16K Feb 21 08:53 context-meta.db
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata    32K Apr 22 20:07 context-meta.db-shm
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata   1.8M Apr 22 12:37 context-meta.db-wal
drwxrwx---  2 netdata  netdata   124B Apr 24 05:30 dbengine
drwxrwx---  2 netdata  netdata    73B Apr 24 01:27 dbengine-tier1
-rw-------  1 netdata  netdata   795K Sep 10  2022 dead.letter
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata   2.7M Apr 23 23:34 netdata-meta.db
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata    32K Apr 24 05:42 netdata-meta.db-shm
-rw-r-----  1 netdata  netdata   9.0M Apr 24 05:29 netdata-meta.db-wal
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/var/cache/netdata # du -hs dbengine
185M    dbengine
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/var/cache/netdata # du -hs dbengine-tier1
 76M    dbengine-tier1
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/var/cache/netdata #
